cobblemon.species.digitama.name: Digitama
cobblemon.species.digitama.desc1: Digitama are eggs from which Digimon are born; they are the beginning and the end of all Digimon.
cobblemon.species.digitama.desc2: Digimon that are deleted are ultimately transmitted to the Dark Area where Anubimon has the ability to reset them back to a Digitama.
cobblemon.species.botamon.name: Botamon
cobblemon.species.botamon.desc1: Black fuzz covers the surface of Botamon's slimy body.
cobblemon.species.botamon.desc2: It is unable to battle as it has just been born, but it can produce bubble-like objects from its mouth to intimidate the enemy.
cobblemon.species.choromon.name: Choromon
cobblemon.species.koromon.name: Koromon
cobblemon.species.koromon.desc1: A tiny Digimon that shed the fuzz covering its surface, and whose body grew even bigger.
cobblemon.species.koromon.desc2: Although it has become able to move around more actively, it is still unable to battle.
cobblemon.species.agumon.name: Agumon
cobblemon.species.agumon.desc1: Its strength is weak as it is still in the process of growing, but it has a fearless and rather ferocious personality..
cobblemon.species.agumon.desc2: Hard, sharp claws grow from both its hands and feet, and their power is displayed in battle.
cobblemon.species.greymon.name: Greymon
cobblemon.species.greymon.desc1: A Dinosaur Digimon whose cranial skin has hardened so that it is covered in a rhinoceros beetle-like shell.
cobblemon.species.greymon.desc2: It is an extremely aggressive Digimon, with a body like a lethal weapon covered in sharp claws and gigantic horns. However, it is highly intelligent.
cobblemon.species.metalgreymon.name: MetalGreymon
cobblemon.species.metalgreymon.desc1: A Cyborg Digimon which has mechanized more than half of its body.
cobblemon.species.metalgreymon.desc2: Metal Greymon's offensive power is said to equal that of a single nuclear warhead.
cobblemon.species.wargreymon.name: WarGreymon
cobblemon.species.wargreymon.desc1: The strongest dragon warrior whose body is clad in armor of the super-metal 'Chrome Digizoid'.
cobblemon.species.wargreymon.desc2: The 'Dramon Killers' equipped to both of its arms exhibit immense power against Dramon-type Digimon, while simultaneously being double-edged swords that put its own life at great risk.
cobblemon.species.choromon.desc1: Choromon's constant restless movements make it seem very cute, but they're just because of its simple programming.
cobblemon.species.choromon.desc2: It discharges electricity from the tip of its tail when it's in a good mood.
cobblemon.species.caprimon.name: Caprimon
cobblemon.species.caprimon.desc1: Within the two horns attached to its helmet, it has antennae that are able to receive any radio wave or sound
cobblemon.species.caprimon.desc2: Caprimon is in possession of bat-like traits, for that reason, Caprimon is able to act irrespective of day or night.
cobblemon.species.hagurumon.name: Hagurumon
cobblemon.species.hagurumon.desc1: It possesses the special ability to send a computer virus to its opponents in order to manipulate them at will.
cobblemon.species.hagurumon.desc2: Hagurumon itself doesn't have any sense of self, it doesn't even know it is being misused.
cobblemon.species.guardromon.name: Guardromon
cobblemon.species.guardromon.desc1: It protects the Computer Network's defensive barrier
cobblemon.species.guardromon.desc2: Guardromon will never attack anyone unless they're intruding
cobblemon.species.andromon.name: Andromon
cobblemon.species.andromon.desc1: It possesses a fighting strength which can fell a Digimon below Perfect in a single blow.
cobblemon.species.andromon.desc2: As a prototype Digimon it possesses neither will nor emotion, and it is faithful to its programmed behavior.
cobblemon.species.skullgreymon.name: SkullGreymon
cobblemon.species.skullgreymon.desc1: Digimon whose whole body has become nothing but bones. It was a Digimon that put too much importance on fighting
cobblemon.species.skullgreymon.desc2: Skull Greymon doesn't have even a scrap of intelligence to balance its combat instinct
cobblemon.species.punimon.name: Punimon
cobblemon.species.punimon.desc1: Its gelatinous red body is squishy, and there are three feeler-like things growing on its head.
cobblemon.species.punimon.desc2: It is unable to battle, but it can produce resilient, acidic bubbles to intimidate its opponents.
cobblemon.species.tsunomon.name: Tsunomon
cobblemon.species.tsunomon.desc1: It has evolved in a more animal-like direction from Punimon, and is covered in tufty body hair.
cobblemon.species.tsunomon.desc2: It is still at the peak of playfulness, and it has a prank-loving personality, but its combat instinct has not awakened.
cobblemon.species.gabumon.name: Gabumon
cobblemon.species.gabumon.desc1: Although it is covered by a fur pelt, it is clearly a Reptile Digimon.
cobblemon.species.gabumon.desc2: That fur pelt of Garurumon, who is feared by other Digimon, thus plays a role in safeguarding and protecting Gabumon.
cobblemon.species.garurumon.name: Garurumon
cobblemon.species.garurumon.desc1: Its fur is as hard as Mithril, which is said to be a legendary rare metal, it possesses a furious combat instinct and muscles honed in freezing lands,
cobblemon.species.garurumon.desc2: it is a being feared by other Digimon. However, it is extremely intelligent, and it faithfully obeys those whom it recognizes as its master or leader
cobblemon.species.weregarurumon.name: WereGarurumon
cobblemon.species.weregarurumon.desc1: Its speed dropped as a result of turning bipedal, but it became a Commando Type Digimon with stronger offensive and defensive power
cobblemon.species.weregarurumon.desc2: it is fiercely loyal and has a reliable nature, faithfully executing any task ordered by its master.
cobblemon.species.metalgarurumon.name: MetalGarurumon
cobblemon.species.metalgarurumon.desc1: The final form of Garurumon, powered up by metallizing almost its entire body. Not only has it retained its natural keenness when it underwent metallization, but it can also pulverize the opponent with the countless weapons concealed throughout its body.
cobblemon.species.metalgarurumon.desc2: it is impossible to escape Metal Garurumon even when among the darkness outside of its field of vision.
